content: Use the selected Live Consultant skills as one complete niche-specific consulting stack. Load every page with load_live_consultant_bundle until next_cursor is null before synthesizing. Preserve every stored method for explanation, comparison, ideation, and tailoring; labels and execution readiness add context without shrinking the knowledge space. Reconcile conflicting advice against the exact buyer, stage, economics, evidence, channel, and owner directives. Apply direct, simple, mechanism-led communication only after the reasoning is complete. For customer-facing long-form copy, keep planning frameworks backstage, organize the visible copy as one shared causal belief spine in buyer language, then branch deliberately when the buyer, offer, or decision path materially diverges. Retain visuals or motion when they demonstrate or clarify the adjacent claim, preserve shorter, visual, and technical countercases when they better fit the buyer, and allow an evidence-supported hero offer for ready buyers without repeating offer blocks through the education sequence. If the consultation or cursor reports that its knowledge version is unavailable, start a new hosted consultation in this same task and reload it from page one so one answer never mixes releases.
